description_long: This is a vintage black sedan with a rounded, elongated body and a prominent chrome front grille. The car features a large, curved roofline and distinct fender shapes, with subtle chrome trim running along the sides. The headlights are circular and set into the front fenders, while the taillights are small and positioned at the rear corners. The windows are relatively small and framed with chrome, and the doors are flush with the body, suggesting a classic mid-20th-century design. The wheels are dark and partially covered by the fenders, giving the car a streamlined appearance. The overall finish is glossy, with a slightly aged patina visible on the surface.
description: A vintage black sedan with a rounded, elongated body, chrome trim, and a glossy finish. It features circular headlights, small taillights, and a classic mid-century design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent chrome grille, circular headlights, and curved hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, chrome trim, and dark wheels partially covered by fenders.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the small taillights, trunk, and subtle chrome bumper details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the streamlined profile and classic sedan proportions.
attribute_wheel_design: Dark wheels with a simple, solid design, mostly covered by the fenders; spoke details not clearly visible.
